headline: Fox Advisors Downgrades Western Digital Corporation (WDC) – Here’s Why
summary: Western Digital Corporation (NASDAQ:WDC) is one of the top trending US stocks to buy now. Western Digital Corporation (NASDAQ:WDC) was downgraded by Fox Advisors to Equal-Weight from Outperform on June 22, with the firm citing concerns that expectations for hard disk drive pricing “may be getting ahead” of likely increases. Western Digital Corporation (NASDAQ:WDC) also […]
